title: Prepared statements fail on execution with message 'Symbol type not found'
key_bug_features: Prepared statements with placeholders for string type
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (s STRING, i INT, d DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO t (s, i, d) VALUES ('test', 1, 1.1);
INSERT INTO t (s, i, d) VALUES (NULL, 2, 2.2);
SELECT * FROM t WHERE i IN (SELECT i FROM t WHERE d > 1.0);
